post_copy_actions: Update package.json repository to atomicstrata/atomicmemory with directory packages/core.
Update package.json homepage and bugs URLs to the monorepo issue tracker.
Strip references to atomicmemory-core repo paths in README.md, CHANGELOG.md, and ROADMAP.md (replace with monorepo paths).
Replace .env.example references to old repo CI workflows if any exist.
Run npm pack --dry-run --json and reconcile the published file list against this allowlist.
notes: Core ships an HTTP service plus migrations; deploy/, Dockerfile, railway.toml, and docker-compose*.yml are part of the public package surface and stay in the allowlist. Reviewer must confirm that openapi.json/openapi.yaml at this commit do not embed non-public hostnames or credentials before signoff.
